requestedAction: Read Instagram analytics for @agdigitalz in read-only mode.
scope: If converted into an active approved lock later, this may authorize read-only Instagram analytics for @agdigitalz only. It does not authorize OAuth, posting, scheduling, DMs/comments, n8n activation, paid tools, credential storage in repo, domain/DNS, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution changes.
revocationPath: This approval is revoked, expired, cancelled, or invalidated when the owner revokes it, expiration passes, requested permissions expand beyond read-only analytics, account state is revoked, expired, or blocked, or posting, scheduling, DMs/comments, n8n activation, paid tools, domain/DNS, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution scope appears.

evidence.reference: Owner must approve future read-only analytics access separately.
